title: RSW 10 Family Santa & Friends 12" Crackers – Fun Christmas Crackers with Santa, Elf, Snowman & Reindeer Designs – Includes Hats, Mottos & Festive Gifts
features: BOX OF 10 FAMILY CRACKERS – Ten 12-inch crackers featuring Santa, elf, snowman, Mrs Claus and reindeer designs with red curling ribbon
BRIGHT AND PLAYFUL DESIGNS – Blue and white bases with snowflakes, stars and festive character prints for a fun Christmas table display
FUN CONTENTS – Each cracker includes a paper hat, motto and a novelty gift to entertain guests during dinner
PERFECT FOR FAMILY GATHERINGS – A cheerful choice for Christmas dinner, parties or festive celebrations with children
ECO-FRIENDLY CHOICE – Recyclable crackers and packaging help you celebrate Christmas more sustainably
description: Product description Make Christmas dinner extra special with the RSW 10 Family Santa & Friends 12" Crackers. This cheerful set includes ten full-size crackers, each decorated with a mix of blue and white bases featuring snowflakes and stars, along with adorable character designs including Santa, elf, snowman, Mrs Claus and reindeer. Finished with bright red curling ribbon, they create a joyful and colourful table display that children and adults alike will love. Inside each cracker, you’ll find a paper hat, motto, and a novelty prize to keep everyone entertained. The gifts include a variety of small toys and games, ideal for creating laughter and conversation around the table. Perfect for family dinners, festive parties, and gatherings with friends, these crackers add a lively and playful touch to your Christmas celebrations. The crackers and packaging are recyclable, making them a responsible choice for eco-conscious households. Their generous 12" size ensures they look impressive as part of any table setting, bringing festive fun for guests of all ages. WARNING! DO NOT PULL INNER OUTSIDE PARTY CRACKER. PULL CRACKER AWAY FROM FACE. DO NOT PULL NEAR EYES OR EARS. PULL BOTH ENDS AT ARMS LENGTH FIRMLY AND SHARPLY. DO NOT REMOVE INNER. WARNING! Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts which could represent a choking hazard. Contents may include glass and items with functional sharp points or edges. Adult supervision is required. Items may fall from crackers whilst pulling. Safety Warning WARNING! DO NOT PULL INNER OUTSIDE PARTY CRACKER. PULL CRACKER AWAY FROM FACE. DO NOT PULL NEAR EYES OR EARS. PULL BOTH ENDS AT ARMS LENGTH FIRMLY AND SHARPLY. DO NOT REMOVE INNER. WARNING!
